Plaintiffs' Request For Court Judgment And Memorandum In Support Of Plaintiffs' Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Roselia Aguiniga.
Dept. 514. Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Alexander Lemieux, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Elida Suastegui and Cesar Torrez Cruz, who were placed under oath and testified.
Court Certified Spanish speaking interpreter Jean Garascia assisted both Ms. Suastegui and Mr. Cruz during this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Roselia Aguiniga.
Plaintiffs' complaint for Nuisance, Negligence, Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress, Retaliatory Eviction, etc. was filed on October 22, 2018, and personally served on defendant Roselia Aguiniga on October 30, 2018.
Default as to defendant Roselia Aguiniga was entered on Decmeber 4, 2018.
Statement of (Punitive) Damages was served on defendant Roselia Aguiniga on May 21, 2019.
No DOE defendants named in complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Elida Suastegui and Cesar Torrez Cruz, and against the Defaulted Defendant Roselia Aguiniga, as follows:

Damages - $12,150.00.
Costs - $450.00.
Punitive Damages - $12,400.00.

Total - $25,000.00.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepared the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiffs' Request For Court Judgment And Memorandum In Support Of Plaintiffs' Request For Court Judgment
